name: Switch
visual_summary: A Switch is a toggle button that displays two alternative states, typically with a 'on' and 'off' state. It is used when the user needs to toggle between two states. It is visually represented by a switch icon that users can click to toggle between the states.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: Switch
Description: A Switch is a toggle button that displays two alternative states, typically with a 'on' and 'off' state. It is used when the user needs to toggle between two states. It is visually represented by a switch icon that users can click to toggle between the states.
Style: material
Interactions: clickable
Tags: toggle, button, ui_element

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
